_comment: Funnel resources on the shared node paskamyrsky.tail6ed53b.ts.net. The two RAGs are GPU-bound, both funnel on port 443 (default), run one at a time, and are each managed by their OWN tool - this panel shows them read-only and never touches their funnel. The vault needs no GPU and carries a Google gate, so it owns funnel port 8443 and coexists with whichever RAG is on 443. Funnel allows only 443/8443/10000; never run `tailscale funnel reset` (it would wipe every service at once).

resources.name: rag-mikkonumminen
resources.label: mikkonumminen.dev RAG chat
resources.note: GPU-bound; managed by ragctl (Python/WSL). Read-only here.

resources.name: rag-feedback
resources.label: Feedback Intelligence
resources.note: GPU-bound; managed by feedctl (.NET). Read-only here.
